=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
8/22/03	Syracuse, New York, New York State Fair, Grandstand

Unknown rec. Very Good sound

CD1
01. Intro
02. Tombstone Blues (Bob on piano)
03. Senor (Tales Of Yankee Power) (Bob on piano and harp)
04. Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 
05. It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on cittern)
06. Dignity (Bob on piano)
07. Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano)
08. This Wheel's On Fire (Bob on piano and harp)
09. Most Likely You Go Your Way (And I'll Go Mine), (Bob on piano and harp)
10. It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic), (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel, Tommy on electric guitar)
11. High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano) 
12. Moonlight (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass),


CD2
01. Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar, Tommy on electric guitar)
02  Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) ,(Bob on piano and harp, Larry on cittern)
03. Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass, Tommy on electric guitar) 
04. Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar)
05. All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano, Tommy on electric guitar)
06. Tangled Up In Blue (Bob on piano and harp, Larry acoustic guitar, Freddie and Tony on electric)
